title: 安田記念の後に・故に、怪物

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki races with no holds barred, but the
audience is unshaken in their support for Oguri
Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno asks me why she can't surpass Oguri Cap
no matter how well she does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thinking on it for a while, I decide that it
must be because Oguri Cap turns the support of
her fans into more power to run. In that case,
she's only going to get stronger from here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki needs a secret weapon of her own.
I believe that her competitive spirit could be that
weapon, but it could be a double-edged sword.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to keep that thought to myself for now
and tell her I'll search for other ways. We decide
to make the Takarazuka Kinen our next goal.
